Rania.name: Duo Fruit + Cool Strawberry
Rania.ingredientsSummary: sorbitol, maltodextrin, 2% malic acid, magnesium stearate, maltitol, aspartame, citric acid, artificial flavor, modified cornstarch, hydrogenated vegetable oil (soybean oil, cottonseed oil, palm oil), artificial color (red 40 lake, red 40, blue 1), gum acacia, lecithin (soy).
